name: Picadillo (Spicy Beef)
recipeIngredient: 2 large Fresh tomatoes, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat over medium heat until it begins to cook and some of the fat starts to render out.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
3. Drain off any excess fat, if present.
4. Add all remaining ingredients except the almonds. Simmer for about 30 minutes.
5. Just before serving, add the sliced almonds as a garnish on top of the dish.
